summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of PHASE 3.5.2 Signal Ensemble Engine. All API endpoints and functionality working correctly. 100% test success rate after fixing minor request parsing issue.

fixed_issues.issue: Request body parameters not being parsed correctly - regime defaulting to UNKNOWN
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Updated endpoint to use Pydantic model for request body parsing

passed_tests: Health check endpoint - returns status healthy and version phase_3.5.2
Stats endpoint - returns engine statistics with correct version and presets
Current weights endpoint - returns all 10 alpha weights with default preset
Weight presets - All 5 presets (default, aggressive, conservative, trend_following, mean_reversion) working correctly
Weights preview with regime adjustment - Correctly adjusts weights based on market regime (TRENDING, RANGING, etc.)
Ensemble signal evaluation - POST /api/signal-ensemble/evaluate with proper direction, strength, confidence, quality output
Conflict analysis - GET /api/signal-ensemble/conflict-analysis/{symbol} with detailed breakdown
Batch ensemble evaluation - POST /api/signal-ensemble/batch for multiple symbols
Regime scenarios testing - All 4 regimes (TRENDING, RANGING, VOLATILE, COMPRESSION) handle properly
Weight adjustment validation - Regime-based weight changes working (e.g., TRENDING boosts trend alphas)
Conflict resolution working - has_conflict flag, conflict_severity, resolution_action properly calculated
Signal quality assessment - Proper categorization into LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/PREMIUM quality levels
Action score calculation - Proper position sizing recommendations (0-1 scale)
Alpha integration - Successfully integrates with Alpha Engine (PHASE 3.5.1) via mock data
MongoDB integration - Repository layer working for snapshots and history storage
